### `id`

string

### `date_modified`

string (date-time)

The last moment when the item was modified

Lookups: `day`, `gt`, `gte`, `hour`, `lt`, `lte`, `minute`, `month`, `range`, `second`, `year`

### `in_use`

boolean

Whether this jurisdiction is in use in CourtListener -- increasingly True

### `has_opinion_scraper`

boolean

Whether the jurisdiction has a scraper that obtains opinions automatically.

### `has_oral_argument_scraper`

boolean

Whether the jurisdiction has a scraper that obtains oral arguments automatically.

### `position`

integer

A dewey-decimal-style numeral indicating a hierarchical ordering of jurisdictions

### `start_date`

string (date)

the date the court was established, if known

Lookups: `day`, `gt`, `gte`, `lt`, `lte`, `month`, `range`, `year`

### `end_date`

string (date)

the date the court was abolished, if known

Lookups: `day`, `gt`, `gte`, `lt`, `lte`, `month`, `range`, `year`

### `short_name`

string

a short name of the court

Lookups: `iexact`, `istartswith`, `startswith`

### `full_name`

string

the full name of the court

Lookups: `iexact`, `istartswith`, `startswith`

### `citation_string`

string

the citation abbreviation for the court as dictated by Blue Book

Lookups: `iexact`, `istartswith`, `startswith`

### `dockets`

integer

Related endpoint: [`dockets`](./dockets.md)

### `jurisdiction`

string | array of string

the jurisdiction of the court, one of: F (Federal Appellate), FD (Federal District), FB (Federal Bankruptcy), FBP (Federal Bankruptcy Panel), FS (Federal Special), S (State Supreme), SA (State Appellate), ST (State Trial), SS (State Special), TRS (Tribal Supreme), TRA (Tribal Appellate), TRT (Tribal Trial), TRX (Tribal Special), TS (Territory Supreme), TA (Territory Appellate), TT (Territory Trial), TSP (Territory Special), SAG (State Attorney General), MA (Military Appellate), MT (Military Trial), C (Committee), I (International), T (Testing)
